actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: They grow and develop Slowly, but surely.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Ideas will grow and develop slowly, but surely.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Soil is what helps plants grow.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Minds are like fertile soil, helping ideas grow.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Ideas need to be watered, nurtured, and fed.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Ideas need to be watered, nurtured, and fed in order to grow into real solutions.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: It takes time and patience to grow an idea.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Time and patience are like fertilizer and water,  helping ideas to grow.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A new idea might grow from a small seed.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: new idea might grow from a small seed.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: A new idea is like a small seed, it doesn't seem like much at first but it can grow into a whole tree if given time.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Without strong roots, good ideas will die.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: If ideas aren't properly pruned and shaped, they can become wild and out of control.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Some will thrive and some will die, but the idea will always grow.

actions.text: Some will thrive and some will die, but a good idea properly cultivated will always grow.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Every idea needs water to grow.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Ideas start off small and grow with time.

actions.text: Good ideas often start off small and grow with time.
